Services

Work with Miss Kisumu 2026 for campaigns that celebrate African beauty, confidence, and culture.

👑

Runway & Pageantry

Professional runway walks, pageant coaching, and crown appearances for prestigious events across Kenya.

📸

Brand Campaigns

Authentic modeling for beauty, fashion, and lifestyle brands seeking a real Kenyan audience connection.

🎬

Editorial Shoots

High-fashion editorial and commercial photography with signature poise and versatility.

🎤

Event Hosting

Charismatic MC and guest speaker for galas, launches, and women empowerment forums.

💄

Beauty Consulting

Personalized skincare, haircare routines, and product curation for melanin-rich beauty.

🤳

Content Creation

UGC videos, TikTok/Reels, and Instagram collaborations with 150K+ engaged followers.

About Joyvelma

Joyvelma Akinyi is a Kenyan model, entrepreneur, and beauty visionary crowned Miss Kisumu 2026. Born and raised in the lakeside city, she represents modern Luo elegance — bold, graceful, and purpose-driven.

From walking major runways in Nairobi to mentoring young girls in Kisumu, Joyvelma blends high fashion with community impact. Her platform, "Stride With Joyvelma," champions confidence, skincare education, and economic empowerment for young Kenyan women.

When she's not on set, you'll find her curating affordable beauty products, hosting masterclasses, or creating content that celebrates authentic African beauty.

Miss Kisumu 2026 Model Entrepreneur Kisumu, Kenya
